headline: Industrial Demand Surge & Retail Sales Growth Drive ETR's Q1 Earnings
summary: Entergy misses Q1 EPS estimates despite strong revenue growth and an industrial demand surge, as rising costs and interest expenses weigh on results.

raw.headline: Industrial Demand Surge & Retail Sales Growth Drive ETR's Q1 Earnings
raw.summary: Entergy misses Q1 EPS estimates despite strong revenue growth and an industrial demand surge, as rising costs and interest expenses weigh on results.

headline: Edison International Q1 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
summary: EIX beats first-quarter EPS and revenue estimates, but expenses jump, and operating income falls; 2026 earnings are guided at $5.86-$6.16.

raw.headline: Edison International Q1 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
raw.summary: EIX beats first-quarter EPS and revenue estimates, but expenses jump, and operating income falls; 2026 earnings are guided at $5.86-$6.16.
